##NAMES=Hemihedrite
##RRUFFID=R140134
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=ZnPb_10_(CrO_4_)_6_(SiO_4_)_2_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Rat Tail Claim, Wickenburg Area, Belmont Mts, Maricopa County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ron Gibbs
##DESCRIPTION=Orange axe-head shaped crystals, reported in Lafuente et al (2017)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140134
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Zn_0.91_Mg_0.02_)Pb_10.05_(Cr_5.98_S_0.01_P_0.01_)Si_1.97_O_34_H_2.16_ ; H_2_O calculated to achieve 34 O atoms.
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
